title: centaurium quadrifolium var. barrelieri
intro: Centaurium quadrifolium var. barrelieri, also known as Barrelier's centaury, is a plant species within the gentian family (Gentianaceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Barrelier's centaury include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce anxiety and stress, and alleviate symptoms of insomnia. Barrelier's centaury can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or dried extract for use in herbal remedies, although its use should be consulted with a healthcare professional before consumption.
